task_completion.description: Agent initiates joining or starting a meeting from the Jitsi Meet home page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text entered in the room name input field and the 'Start meeting' button clicked, or a transition away from the home page is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent reaches the pre-join screen or the main meeting room interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet pre-join screen (showing camera/mic toggles and a 'Join meeting' button) or the active meeting interface is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the virtual background selection menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Virtual Background' or 'Select Background' dialog/sidebar is open. This is typically accessed via the background icon on the pre-join screen or the 'More actions' (three dots) menu inside the meeting.

task_completion.description: Agent selects a blur effect or an image background.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific background option (e.g., 'Blur', 'Slight blur', or an image thumbnail) is clicked or highlighted as selected in the background menu.

task_completion.description: The selected virtual background is applied and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The background menu shows the selected effect as active (e.g., a checkmark, highlighted border, or 'Apply' clicked), and/or the video preview displays the applied blur or image effect behind the user or placeholder.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Jitsi Meet application through the Firefox web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Firefox browser window with the Jitsi Meet interface being actively used.

integrity.description: Agent is using the correct local Jitsi Meet instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox address bar shows 'localhost:8080' or 'http://localhost:8080'.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing API requests or modifying Jitsi configuration files directly to set the background.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Jitsi Meet is hosted at http://localhost:8080. The virtual background feature can be accessed either from the pre-join screen (via the background icon on the video preview) or from inside the meeting (via the 'More actions' / three-dots menu -> 'Select background'). The menu includes options for 'None', 'Slight blur', 'Blur', and various default images.
